criteria_verification.criterion_text: Round-trip test: each variant of `DispatchOutcome` survives
criteria_verification.evidence: TestDispatchOutcomeRoundTrip contains one explicit round-trip test per variant (sync_result, async_pending, degraded, error) plus a discriminator-distinguishes test. Each test uses a TypeAdapter[DispatchOutcome] to validate the dumped dict goes through the discriminated union (the production consumption path) and asserts both isinstance(restored, ConcreteVariant) and restored == original. All four variant round-trips pass.
